name: Angelica Liqueur 3 (Galliano)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the sugar syrup in a jar.
2. Seal tightly and shake well.
3. Let the mixture steep for one week, allowing the flavors to meld.
4. Filter through cheesecloth several times to remove solids.
5. Add the sugar syrup and bottle the liqueur.
